title: Payment session data model and UUID keying
description: Define PaymentSession struct: id (Uuid, generated by payer), chain, amount_zatoshi, peer_pub_id, role (Payer/Payee), state (enum), created_at, updated_at, tx_hash Option, address Option. Serialize to wallet DB. Session ID travels in all PaymentAction messages as a new session_id field — add to ClearMessage::Payment in messages.rs.
close_reason: PaymentSession/PaymentRole/PaymentState structs in messages.rs; session_id: Uuid added to ClearMessage::Payment; serde roundtrip tests
